pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly sets PROJECT_DIR='/home/ga/PycharmProjects/motor_control' and creates the repository there.
Counted the tests generated in setup_task.sh (5 in test_pid.py, 4 in test_motor_driver.py, 3 in test_filters.py).
verifier.py calculates the score up to 100 and evaluates success with 'passed = (score >= 65)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the project directory '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/motor_control'. There are 12 tests in total (5 PID tests, 4 motor driver tests, and 3 filter tests) that the agent needs to pass. The agent needs a minimum score of 65 points and must successfully remove all conflict markers to pass.
